accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; the description of reporting and review requirements is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all content traces to the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as requiring FEMA and Comptroller General to review and report on disability disaster assistance.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill does not amend existing law, and the summary does not claim to address this.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this bill.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the 120-day and one-year deadlines.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both the FEMA report requirement and the joint review, including the physical disabilities expansion in the review.

concise.why: Appropriately concise while covering the essential provisions.

correct_entities.why: FEMA Administrator and Comptroller General correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
